query: I am about to get back to work in the office is light 2 on right now or is it off?

steps.thought: I need to find the office room and check the state of light 2. First, get all rooms to identify the office.
Office exists as room_id 'office'. Now get devices in the office to find light 2.
There is only one light in the office: office_on_off_light_1. I will check its OnOff attribute to see if it's on or off.
The user asked about 'light 2' in the office, but only one light exists (office_on_off_light_1). Its OnOff attribute is false, indicating it is off.

action_input.answer: There is only one light in the office (light 1), and it is currently off. There is no light 2.
